kpis.title: Request Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("smg_http_requests_total", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Active Requests
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, CAST("smg_worker_requests_active" AS DOUBLE) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Token Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("smg_router_tokens_total", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Upstream Response Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("smg_router_upstream_responses_total", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Request Error Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("smg_router_request_errors_total", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Time to First Token (TTFT)
kpis.sql:
WITH d AS (
  SELECT timestamp,
         h2_delta("smg_router_ttft_seconds:buckets",
                  LAG("smg_router_ttft_seconds:buckets") OVER (ORDER BY timestamp)) AS d
  FROM {{view}}
)
SELECT timestamp::DOUBLE/1e9 AS t,
       q::VARCHAR AS quantile,
       h2_quantile(d, q, {{p}})::DOUBLE AS v
FROM d, (VALUES (0.5), (0.95)) qs(q)
WHERE d IS NOT NULL

kpis.title: Time per Output Token (TPOT)
kpis.sql:
WITH d AS (
  SELECT timestamp,
         h2_delta("smg_router_tpot_seconds:buckets",
                  LAG("smg_router_tpot_seconds:buckets") OVER (ORDER BY timestamp)) AS d
  FROM {{view}}
)
SELECT timestamp::DOUBLE/1e9 AS t,
       q::VARCHAR AS quantile,
       h2_quantile(d, q, {{p}})::DOUBLE AS v
FROM d, (VALUES (0.5), (0.95)) qs(q)
WHERE d IS NOT NULL

kpis.title: HTTP Request Duration
kpis.sql:
WITH d AS (
  SELECT timestamp,
         h2_delta("smg_http_request_duration_seconds:buckets",
                  LAG("smg_http_request_duration_seconds:buckets") OVER (ORDER BY timestamp)) AS d
  FROM {{view}}
)
SELECT timestamp::DOUBLE/1e9 AS t,
       q::VARCHAR AS quantile,
       h2_quantile(d, q, {{p}})::DOUBLE AS v
FROM d, (VALUES (0.5), (0.95)) qs(q)
WHERE d IS NOT NULL
